sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 5.39 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.5)

statement.latex: Prove that every countable group can act faithfully as a group of automorphisms of a finitely generated soluble group (of derived length at most~4). For background to this problem, in particular its relationship with problem 8.50, see (P.\,M.\,Neumann, in: Groups--Korea, Pusan, 1988$($Lect. Notes Math., 1398), Springer, Berlin, 1989, 124--139).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
